critical_invariants: LOCK prefix must be present on ALL atomic operations - removing it causes data races
APIC ID mapping must remain consistent with hardware topology
Spinlock acquire/release pairs must maintain memory ordering (no reordering across lock boundaries)
MFENCE/SFENCE/LFENCE barriers must not be removed or reordered
Read-write lock upgrade/downgrade sequence must be atomic
IPI (Inter-Processor Interrupt) delivery mechanism must not be altered
AP wakeup sequence follows Intel MP specification timing requirements
XCHG-based lock acquisition is implicitly locked - do not substitute with non-atomic MOV
known_opportunities: Lock contention reduction: replace test-and-set with test-and-test-and-set (TTAS) pattern
Spinlock-to-PAUSE optimization: insert PAUSE instruction in spin loops to reduce pipeline flush penalty
Exponential backoff in high-contention spin loops
Cache-line alignment of lock variables to prevent false sharing (64-byte alignment)
Replace LOCK CMPXCHG with LOCK BTS for simple flag operations
Reader-writer lock fairness improvement to prevent writer starvation
Batch IPI delivery using shorthand destinations where possible
